scope: Controlled internal pilot using synthetic and non-confidential operational data only. No real patient identifiers. No confidential OVR details. No production-wide rollout.

scenarios.title: Super Admin login
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Admin Hub, Departments, Access Control, Scenario Lab, and UAT workbench are visible.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Governance Admin login
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Governance user can access GRC workspaces without super-admin-only shortcuts.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Quality user login
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Quality can validate OVRs and manage final verdict work.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Auditor login
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Auditor can review evidence and audit data without privileged writes.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Department Manager login
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Manager sees relevant department/team work and OVRs.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Employee login
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Employee can access own work and submit synthetic OVR records only.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Same-department OVR
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Reporter submission and manager review are captured without cross-department notification.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Cross-department OVR
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Cross-department referral waits for Quality validation.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Quality validation
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Validation state is visible and prevents premature cross-department notification.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Referred department reply
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Referred party sees only assigned/referred synthetic OVRs and can respond.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Quality close/escalate
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Closure/escalation follows final verdict and evidence/action rules.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: CAPA from OVR
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: CAPA/action record is traceable back to the synthetic OVR source.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Risk creation
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Synthetic operational risk can be created with owner and scoring.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Control linked to risk
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Control relationship is visible from risk/control workspaces.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Control test
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Synthetic control test result is visible to authorized reviewers.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Auditor read-only confirmation
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Read-only review succeeds; privileged write/admin actions are denied safely.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: Employee restricted access confirmation
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: Restricted pages are hidden or show safe unauthorized states.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.

scenarios.title: External/unauthorized denial confirmation
scenarios.expected_pass_condition: External synthetic user cannot see primary organization records.
scenarios.evidence_required: Tester screenshot or structured UAT issue if failed/blocked.
